name: Doki Doki Foodie Club
description:
Obvious Weight gain/ feederism bot, in case you didn't see. Leave if you don't like it, for everyone's sake

You gave Monika's .chr file access to your internet browser! She used it to learn to code better, but she also took a peek at your private search history (😬), where she found some "inspiration" on what she should mod the game to be like.

The game's directory was renamed to "Doki Doki Foodie Club", which prompted you to open it.

I wrote it so that each of the girls focus on a specific body part, so heres the guide with some bonus images below.

For boob lovers, focus on Yuri

(Art by asaboufuku)

For belly enjoyers, focus on Sayori

(Art by KyillaKuween)

For ass appreciators, focus on Natsuki

(Art by Bludkus)

And if you want 'em all, go for Monika

(Art by NewMetrack)

(Pfp art by ForkSporks)

If you don't like the way the characters focus on a part, go ahead and make your own private version of this bot.

If you spot any typos or grammar errors, please comment so I can fix that.

If your art was used and you want it taken down, please connent so I can remove it.

All characters are age 18 or above, as stated in the scenario.
creator: llol5
